summary: Iteration 21: Notifications System Testing - Backend 100% passed (13/13 tests), Frontend 100% passed. All notification CRUD endpoints working. Dashboard Activity Feed and Quick Status sections verified. Notification bell with dropdown working. Settings notification preferences with toggleable switches working.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/notifications - Returns notifications list and unread_count (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/notifications?limit=5 - Respects limit parameter (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/notifications?unread_only=true - Filters unread notifications (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/notifications/preferences - Returns user preferences (200 OK)
Backend: PUT /api/notifications/preferences - Updates preferences and persists (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/notifications/read-all - Marks all as read, unread_count becomes 0 (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/notifications/{notif_id}/read - Marks single notification as read (200 OK)
Backend: DELETE /api/notifications/{notif_id} - Deletes notification (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/brands/{brand_id}/approvals - Creates approval and triggers notification (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/brands/{brand_id}/approvals/{id}/action - Action triggers notification (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/brands/{brand_id}/comments - Comment triggers notification (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/brands/{brand_id}/activity - Returns activity feed (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/brands/{brand_id}/approvals?status=pending - Returns pending count (200 OK)
Frontend: Dashboard loads with Activity Feed section ('Atividade Recente')
Frontend: Dashboard shows Quick Status section ('Status Rapido')
Frontend: Dashboard shows Pending Approvals card with count
Frontend: Dashboard shows Unread Notifications card with count
Frontend: Dashboard shows Naming card link
Frontend: Header notification bell icon visible
Frontend: Click bell opens notification dropdown
Frontend: Notification dropdown shows notifications list
Frontend: Settings page loads with Personalization tab
Frontend: Notification section visible in Personalization tab
Frontend: Email notification switch toggleable
Frontend: Comments notification switch toggleable
Frontend: Approvals notification switch toggleable
Frontend: Reports notification switch toggleable
Frontend: Save Preferences button saves to backend API
Frontend: Success toast 'Preferencias salvas!' shown after save
critical_code_review_comments: notifications.py: Well-structured with create_notification helper function that handles both in-app and email notifications
notifications.py: Email preferences properly checked before sending (email_enabled and type-specific prefs)
collaboration.py: Properly imports and uses create_notification for approval and comment events
Layout.js: Notification bell with dropdown implemented correctly with data-testid attributes
Dashboard.js: Activity Feed and Quick Status sections properly fetch data from backend APIs
Settings.js: handleSavePersonalization correctly saves to /api/notifications/preferences endpoint
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed approvals and comments during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notifications system fully tested. Backend CRUD endpoints all working. Frontend notification bell in header works with dropdown. Dashboard has Activity Feed and Quick Status sections. Settings Personalization tab has notification preferences with 4 toggleable switches that save to backend. Tutorial modal appears on first login - click through 'Próximo' buttons to dismiss. Email sending via Resend may fail silently if domain not verified - this is expected behavior.
